Hero.title: Four Weeks with the STEP Program That Opens Doors to University, Scholarships, and Career Opportunities
Hero.description: An intensive training program that fully covers all sections of the STEP exam, with smart solving strategies, realistic mock tests, and a personal mentor guiding you every step of the way.

Statistics.title: Results That Speak for Our Students

Problems.Title: The Problem: You took the STEP exam but didn’t achieve the score you wanted?
items: You’re not familiar with the actual test format and question types
You don’t have a clear and structured study plan
You feel your level is better than the score you got
Time ran out before you could finish all the questions

Solutions.Title: The Solution: STEP Program by Elm Way Academy
Solutions.subTitle: A program designed around the real exam structure to help you achieve your target score from the first attempt
items: A clear weekly plan that covers every section in detail
Live sessions with instructors specialized specifically in STEP
Smart solving strategies to help you answer faster and more accurately without wasting time
Realistic mock exams to eliminate test anxiety before exam day

Curriculum.title: What You’ll Master in 4 Weeks
Curriculum.description: Each week is focused on a core section, with intensive, hands-on training—no filler, just results.

items.title: Listening
items.description: Intensive practice on understanding conversations and audio clips, with a focus on quickly identifying key information and adapting to different accents and speaking speeds.

items.title: Reading Comprehension
items.description: Learn proven speed-reading techniques and how to pinpoint correct answers accurately without rereading passages multiple times.

items.title: Grammar
items.description: A comprehensive review of essential grammar rules, focusing on frequently tested patterns—explained in a practical way using real exam-style questions.

items.title: Mock Exams & Answering Strategies
items.description: Full-length mock exams that replicate the real test in structure and timing, with instant feedback and detailed performance breakdowns.

items.title: Time Management & Test Tactics
items.description: Smart strategies to help you maximize every minute in the exam and avoid common time-wasting traps.

items.title: Interactive Support Community
items.description: Stay connected with instructors and peers throughout the program—get your questions answered quickly, even between sessions.

Journey.title: A Personal Mentor Guiding You Every Step of the Way
Journey.description: From day one, you’ll be connected with a dedicated academic mentor who assesses your current level, builds a personalized study plan tailored to your schedule and goals, and tracks your progress weekly to ensure you stay on the right path.
steps: An initial assessment session to accurately evaluate your English level
A personalized study plan based on your schedule and target score
Weekly follow-ups to track and improve your performance
Continuous support all the way to your exam day

Features.title: Why Students Choose Elm Way Program?

items.title: Live Interactive Training
items.subtitle: Expert instructors answer your questions in real time during the session.

items.title: Full Session Recordings
items.subtitle: Access all recorded lessons anytime and review them whenever you need.

items.title: Personalized Guidance
items.subtitle: We help you identify your weak points and work on improving them.

items.title: Supportive Student Community
items.subtitle: A private group connecting students with instructors for continuous support.

items.title: Flexible Payment Options
items.subtitle: Pay easily through Tamara or Tabby.

items.title: Free Retake Guarantee
items.subtitle: If you complete the program and don't see improvement, you can retake the course for free.

items.q: Does the course guarantee a specific STEP score?
items.a: The course is based on a proven methodology that has delivered real results, with improvement rates exceeding 80% for past trainees. Your results depend on your attendance, engagement, and practice.

items.q: Is the course online or in-person?
items.a: Fully online… live interactive sessions with specialized instructors. All sessions are recorded and available on the platform for review.

items.q: I’m a beginner or intermediate level. Is this course suitable for me?
items.a: Yes. The course starts from the basics and gradually builds up. It’s designed to suit all levels and help every trainee achieve their best possible results.

items.q: I’ve taken the test before and got a low score. Will this course help me?
items.a: Absolutely. Many of our trainees joined after unsatisfactory attempts and achieved significant improvement. We precisely diagnose your weaknesses and work on them intensively.

items.q: What if I miss a session?
items.a: All sessions are recorded and available on the platform, so you can catch up at a time that suits you.

items.q: Can I access the content after the course ends?
items.a: Yes, all digital content and session recordings remain available on the platform, so you can revisit them anytime you need.

SuccessStory.title: Our Students' Success Stories
SuccessStory.subtitle: Many of our students have improved their aptitude test scores by over 80% after joining the program.

LeadForm.title: Register Now and Start Improving Your Score
LeadForm.subtitle: Fill in your details and our team will contact you within 24 hours to build your study plan.

form.footer: 🔒 Your information is secure and will not be shared with any third party.

Footer.description: Elm Way is a Saudi virtual academy dedicated to helping students and professionals achieve their career goals through specialized training programs and high-quality educational content. The academy provides flexible and accessible learning solutions designed to prepare learners for professional exams and equip them with the knowledge, skills, and confidence needed for career success using modern e-learning technologies.
